Consolidation: a chest X-ray showing pulmonary consolidation
Edema: a chest X-ray showing pulmonary edema
Enlarged Cardiomediastinum: a chest X-ray showing an enlarged cardiomediastinum
Fracture: a chest X-ray showing a fracture
Lung Lesion: a chest X-ray showing a lung lesion
Lung Opacity: a chest X-ray showing a lung opacity
No Finding: a normal chest X-ray with no abnormal finding
Pleural Effusion: a chest X-ray showing pleural effusion
Pleural Other: a chest X-ray showing another pleural abnormality
Support Devices: a chest X-ray showing medical support devices
